heading: Remarriage
label: 4068 Remarriage
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this part, any benefit payable under this part to a surviving spouse, former spouse, or surviving former spouse that would otherwise terminate or be lost if the individual remarried before 60 years of age, shall not terminate or be lost if the remarriage occurred on or after , and the individual was 55 years of age or over on the date of the remarriage.November 8, 1984
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Jan. 1, 1987section 702(a) of Pub. L. 99–335section 8401 of Title 5
